input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`))

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`))

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`))

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`cipher_amount`))

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`cipher_amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`cipher_amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`cipher_amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT COLLATE=utf8mb3_general_ci

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`cipher_amount`)) DEFAULT COLLATE=utf8mb3_general_ci

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255 byte) NOT NULL, password_new VARCHAR(255 char))

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, cipher_password VARCHAR(128 byte) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(64 byte) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(64 byte) NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255 byte) NOT NULL, password_new_cipher VARCHAR(510 char), password_new_assisted VARCHAR(255 char), password_new_like VARCHAR(255 char), password_new_plain VARCHAR(255 char))
